children.heading: Enforceable agreements
children.label: a Enforceable agreements
children.text: Each recipient, through binding contractual agreements with owners and otherwise, shall ensure long-term compliance with the provisions of this chapter. Such measures shall provide for (1) enforcement of the provisions of this chapter by the grant beneficiary or by recipients and other intended beneficiaries, and (2) remedies for the breach of such provisions.

children.heading: Periodic monitoring
children.label: b Periodic monitoring
children.text: Not less frequently than annually, each recipient shall review the activities conducted and housing assisted under this chapter to assess compliance with the requirements of this chapter. Such review shall include an appropriate level of onsite inspection of housing to determine compliance with applicable requirements. The results of each review shall be included in the performance report of the recipient submitted to the Secretary under and made available to the public.section 4164 of this title

children.heading: Performance measures
children.label: c Performance measures
children.text: The Secretary shall establish such performance measures as may be necessary to assess compliance with the requirements of this chapter.
